form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 37 days. Resuming ran last of 12 at Southwell All Weather on February 7 over 1600m, 21 len behind Tiger Power with 63.5kg at $301. Second run from a spell ran last of 11 at Southwell All Weather on March 4 over 2200m, 59 len behind That's Amore carrying 59.5kg at $201. Looking elsewhere again.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second of 11 at Newcastle All Weather January 13 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Maria Da Silva carrying 56kg at $4.30. On debut fifth of 9 at Newcastle All Weather December 2 over 1400m, 6 len behind Art Gallery with 59.5kg at $17. Strong chance if he can reproduce second up form.

On debut fifth of 9 at Newcastle All Weather December 2 over 1400m, 6 len behind Art Gallery with 59.5kg at $17. Strong chance if he can reproduce second up form.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when settled back and ran on when 7th of 12 at Ripon on August 16 over 1600m, 13 len behind Suspended Sentence with 60.5kg at $19. Worth another chance.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, 10th of 12 at Doncaster on March 29 over 1400m, 7 len behind Langstone carrying 59kg at $41. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when ran last of 10 at Chelmsford on August 21 over 1400m, 17 len behind Galileo Island carrying 60.5kg at $101. Hard to enthuse.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 10 at this track on May 3 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Anaisa with 59.5kg at $9. Much better for that experience.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 10 at this track on May 3 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Anaisa with 59.5kg at $9. Much better for that experience.

form.formComment: First-starter by Study Of Man out of Alboretta. Tough to line up. Capable of a cheeky run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Study Of Man out of Alboretta. Tough to line up. Capable of a cheeky run.

form.formComment: Jumped at very long odds at debut, second last of 9 at Southwell All Weather on March 21 over 1600m, 17 len behind Timber Twelve with 53kg at $51. Doubt she will trouble these.

form.formComment: At debut, ran last in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 31 over 1700m, 10 len behind Lizzana with 56kg at $13. No surprise to see her in the finish.
